\tzpentry{ID5768}{Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5768 introduces Trawin Topology Unified Field Theory Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Phi = n \Phi_{0}, \qquad \Phi_{0} = \frac{h}{2e} \approx 2.07\times 10^{-15}\,\mathrm{Wb}. \]
